title: Nvidia Will Spend $26 Billion to Build Open-Weight AI Models, Filings Show
summary: The move could position the AI infrastructure powerhouse to quickly compete with OpenAI, Anthropic, and DeepSeek.
title_es: NVIDIA invertirá $26 mil millones en modelos IA de código abierto
bajada: Según documentos de SEC, NVIDIA planea invertir $26 mil millones en el desarrollo de modelos IA de peso abierto para competir con OpenAI, Anthropic y DeepSeek. El movimiento posiciona al gigante de infraestructura como generador de modelos además de proveedora de hardware.
bajada_en: According to SEC filings, NVIDIA plans to invest $26 billion in developing open-weight AI models to compete with OpenAI, Anthropic, and DeepSeek. The move positions the infrastructure giant as a model creator alongside hardware provider.

title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
title_es: OpenAI lanza agentes con API de Respuestas y soporte para contenedores
bajada: OpenAI presentó una nueva arquitectura para agentes que combina la API de Respuestas, herramientas de shell y contenedores alojados para ejecutar sistemas de IA autónomos seguros y escalables. Esta actualización permite que los desarrolladores construyan agentes más robustos con manejo de archivos, herramientas integradas y estado persistente.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced a new agent architecture combining the Responses API, shell tools, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable autonomous AI systems. This update enables developers to build more robust agents with file handling, integrated tools, and persistent state management.

title: New NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super Delivers 5x Higher Throughput for Agentic AI
summary: Launched today, NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super is a 120‑billion‑parameter open model with 12 billion active parameters designed to run complex agentic AI systems at scale.  Available now, the model combines advanced reasoning capabilities to efficiently complete tasks with high accuracy for autonomous agents. AI-Native Companies: Perplexity offers its users access to Nemotron 3 Super for […]
title_es: NVIDIA lanza Nemotron 3 Super, modelo de 120B parámetros para agentes IA
bajada: NVIDIA presentó Nemotron 3 Super, un modelo de código abierto con 120 mil millones de parámetros y 12 mil millones activos, optimizado para ejecutar sistemas agentic IA complejos a escala. El modelo combina capacidades avanzadas de razonamiento y está disponible inmediatamente, con Perplexity como early adopter.
bajada_en: NVIDIA unveiled Nemotron 3 Super, an open-source 120-billion-parameter model with 12 billion active parameters designed to run complex agentic AI systems at scale. The model combines advanced reasoning capabilities and is available now, with Perplexity as an early adopter.

title: Zendesk acquires agentic customer service startup Forethought
summary: Forethought was years ahead of its time and the 2018 winner of TechCrunch Battlefield.
title_es: Zendesk adquiere Forethought, startup de atención al cliente agentic
bajada: Zendesk completó la adquisición de Forethought, una startup pionera en agentes IA para customer service ganadora de TechCrunch Battlefield 2018. La compra refuerza la estrategia de Zendesk de automatizar servicios de soporte con IA agentic.
bajada_en: Zendesk completed the acquisition of Forethought, a pioneering agentic AI startup for customer service and TechCrunch Battlefield 2018 winner. The acquisition strengthens Zendesk's strategy to automate support services with agentic AI.

title: Perplexity’s Personal Computer turns your spare Mac into an AI agent
summary: Perplexity wants to be more than just an answer engine. On Wednesday, it launched Personal Computer, a new AI agent tool that can turn a spare Mac into a locally run AI system, pitching it as "a digital proxy for you." Personal Computer will run 24/7 on a dedicated device on your local network, have […]
title_es: Perplexity lanza Personal Computer, un agente IA para tu Mac local
bajada: Perplexity presentó Personal Computer, una herramienta que convierte un Mac disponible en un agente IA que funciona 24/7 en tu red local. Posicionado como "un proxy digital personal", permite delegar tareas autónomas sin depender de servicios en la nube.
bajada_en: Perplexity introduced Personal Computer, a tool that transforms a spare Mac into an AI agent running 24/7 on your local network. Positioned as a "digital proxy for you," it enables autonomous task delegation without cloud dependency.

title: Microsoft’s Copilot Health can connect to your medical records and wearables
summary: Microsoft announced on Thursday that it's launching Copilot Health, a "separate, secure space" in Copilot for asking questions about lab results and medical records, searching for providers, analyzing data from wearables, and other health-related chats. The feature will have a phased rollout, so it won't be available to everyone immediately, but users can join a […]
title_es: Microsoft Copilot Health integra historial médico y dispositivos wearables
bajada: Microsoft anunció Copilot Health, un espacio seguro dentro de Copilot para consultas sobre registros médicos, resultados de laboratorio, búsqueda de proveedores y análisis de datos de wearables. La feature tendrá un lanzamiento gradual con acceso limitado inicialmente.
bajada_en: Microsoft announced Copilot Health, a secure space within Copilot for health-related queries including medical records, lab results, provider search, and wearable data analysis. The feature will roll out gradually with limited initial access.

title: You can now ask Google Maps ‘complex, real-world questions’ — and Gemini will answer
summary: Google is continuing to weave Gemini into the firmament of its most-used products. Today, it announced that Google Maps was getting a new AI-powered "Ask Maps" feature that allows for "complex, real-world questions" with highly detailed, personalized responses. In the past, Google Maps would struggle with hyper-specific questions like "where can I charge my phone […]
title_es: Google Maps integra Gemini para responder preguntas complejas de navegación
bajada: Google añadió la función "Ask Maps" a Google Maps, que permite hacer preguntas complejas en lenguaje natural a Gemini sobre ubicaciones, servicios y rutas. La feature proporciona respuestas detalladas y personalizadas, mejorando significativamente la usabilidad frente a búsquedas tradicionales.
bajada_en: Google added the "Ask Maps" feature to Google Maps, enabling complex natural language questions to Gemini about locations, services, and directions. The feature provides detailed, personalized responses, significantly improving usability over traditional searches.

title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
summary: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
title_es: OpenAI documenta defensas contra inyección de prompts en agentes IA
bajada: OpenAI publicó un análisis detallado sobre cómo ChatGPT se defiende contra inyección de prompts y ingeniería social en workflows de agentes. El documento explora técnicas de restricción de acciones riesgosas y protección de datos sensibles críticas para agentes en producción.
bajada_en: OpenAI published detailed analysis on how ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering in agent workflows. The document explores techniques for restricting risky actions and protecting sensitive data, critical for production agents.

title: I was backend lead at Manus. After building agents for 2 years, I stopped using function calling entirely. Here's what I use instead.
summary: English is not my first language. I wrote this in Chinese and translated it with AI help. The writing may have some AI flavor, but the design decisions, the production failures, and the thinking that distilled them into principles — those are mine.I was a backend lead at Manus before the Meta acquisition. I've spent the last 2 years building AI agents — first at Manus, then on my own open-source agent runtime (Pinix) and agent (agent-clip). Along the way I came to a conclusion that surprised me:A singlerun(command="...")tool with Unix-style commands outperforms a catalog of typed function calls.Here's what I learned.Why *nixUnix made a design decision 50 years ago:everything is a text stream.Programs don't exchange complex binary structures or share memory objects — they communicate through text pipes. Small tools each do one thing well, composed via|into powerful workflows. Programs describe themselves with--help, report success or failure with exit codes, and communicate errors through stderr.LLMs made an almost identical decision 50 years later:everything is tokens.They only understand text, only produce text. Their "thinking" is text, their "actions" are text, and the feedback they receive from the world must be text.These two decisions, made half a century apart from completely different starting points, converge on the same interface model. The text-based system Unix designed for human terminal operators —cat,grep,pipe,exit codes,man pages— isn't just "usable" by LLMs. It's anatural fit. When it comes to tool use, an LLM is essentially a terminal operator — one that's faster than any human and has already seen vast amounts of shell commands and CLI patterns in its training data.This is the core philosophy of thenix Agent: *don't invent a new tool interface. Take what Unix has proven over 50 years and hand it directly to the LLM.**Why a singlerunThe single-tool hypothesisMost agent frameworks give LLMs a catalog of independent tools:tools: [search_web, read_fil
title_es: Ex-ingeniero de Manus: function calling es innecesario en agentes IA
bajada: Un ingeniero backend que lideró el desarrollo de agentes en Manus (adquirida por Meta) compartió en Reddit un análisis sobre por qué abandonó function calling a favor de comandos Unix en texto plano. El post generó debate significativo sobre los mejores patrones para construir agentes robustos.
bajada_en: A backend engineer who led agent development at Manus (acquired by Meta) shared on Reddit why he abandoned function calling in favor of plain-text Unix commands. The post sparked significant debate on best patterns for building robust agents.

title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
title_es: Rakuten reduce tiempo de reparación 50% usando Codex de OpenAI
bajada: Rakuten implementó Codex, el agente de coding de OpenAI, para acelerar el desarrollo de software y reducir el MTTR (Mean Time To Repair) en 50%. La solución automatiza revisiones de CI/CD y permite entregar builds full-stack en semanas en lugar de meses.
bajada_en: Rakuten deployed Codex, OpenAI's coding agent, to accelerate software development and reduce MTTR by 50%. The solution automates CI/CD reviews and enables full-stack builds delivery in weeks instead of months.

title: Google Maps is getting an AI ‘Ask Maps’ feature and upgraded ‘immersive’ navigation
summary: The tech giant says the "Immersive Navigation" launch is the biggest update to Maps in over a decade.
title_es: Google Maps recibe "Immersive Navigation", su mayor actualización en una década
bajada: Google anunció la mayor actualización de Google Maps en más de 10 años, incluyendo el feature "Immersive Navigation" que ofrece navegación inmersiva mejorada. La actualización complementa el lanzamiento de "Ask Maps" con capacidades de IA avanzadas.
bajada_en: Google announced the biggest Google Maps update in over a decade, including an enhanced "Immersive Navigation" feature. The update complements the "Ask Maps" launch with advanced AI capabilities.

title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
title_es: Wayfair mejora precisión de catálogo con modelos de OpenAI
bajada: Wayfair implementó modelos de OpenAI para mejorar la precisión de su catálogo de productos y acelerar el soporte al cliente, automatizando la clasificación de tickets y enriqueciendo millones de atributos de productos. La solución reduce fricción operativa a escala.
bajada_en: Wayfair deployed OpenAI models to improve product catalog accuracy and accelerate customer support, automating ticket triage and enriching millions of product attributes at scale. The solution reduces operational friction.

title: Meta Is Developing 4 New Chips to Power Its AI and Recommendation Systems
summary: The MTIA processors are the tech giant’s latest attempt to build its own AI hardware, even as it continues spending billions on gear from industry leaders like Nvidia.
title_es: Meta desarrolla 4 nuevos chips MTIA para IA y sistemas de recomendación
bajada: Meta anunció el desarrollo de cuatro nuevos procesadores MTIA diseñados específicamente para IA y sistemas de recomendación. El movimiento refuerza la estrategia de Meta de invertir en hardware propio mientras continúa comprando equipamiento de NVIDIA.
bajada_en: Meta announced development of four new MTIA processors designed specifically for AI and recommendation systems. The move reinforces Meta's strategy to invest in custom hardware while continuing to purchase NVIDIA equipment.

title: GeForce NOW Raises the Game at the Game Developers Conference
summary: GeForce NOW is bringing the game to the Game Developers Conference (GDC), running this week in San Francisco. While developers build the future of gaming, GeForce NOW is delivering it to gamers. The latest updates bring smoother performance, easier game discovery and a fresh lineup of blockbuster titles to the cloud. Game discoverability gets a […]
title_es: NVIDIA GeForce NOW mejora rendimiento y descubrimiento de juegos en GDC
bajada: NVIDIA presentó actualizaciones a GeForce NOW en la Game Developers Conference, incluyendo mejoras de rendimiento, descubrimiento facilitado de juegos y nuevos títulos blockbuster. Las actualizaciones buscan mejorar la experiencia de gaming en la nube.
bajada_en: NVIDIA unveiled updates to GeForce NOW at Game Developers Conference, including performance improvements, easier game discovery, and new blockbuster titles. The updates aim to enhance cloud gaming experience.

title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
summary: A doctor is sitting across a desk from a patient. The doctor is holding a tablet and a pen. Medical charts renderings are in the background.
title_es: IA de Google mejora detección de problemas cardiacos en Australia rural
bajada: Google presentó un caso de uso de su tecnología de IA para mejorar la salud cardíaca en áreas rurales de Australia mediante análisis de registros médicos. El proyecto demuestra el impacto de IA en healthcare en regiones con acceso limitado a especialistas.
bajada_en: Google showcased how its AI technology improves heart health detection in rural Australia through medical record analysis. The project demonstrates AI's impact on healthcare access in regions with limited specialist availability.
